items.example: In other words, your booking was for yesterday.
What I mean is we need to start again from scratch.

items.phrase: Let me put it another way
items.example: Let me put it another way — this is not going to work.
Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you say it again?
I'm sorry, you've lost me. What are you talking about?
Do you mean to tell me that there's nothing available?
So you're saying I can't stay here tonight?

items.phrase: Could you repeat the last part?
items.translation: Не могли бы вы повторить последнюю часть?
items.example: Could you repeat the last part? I didn't hear you.
